headline: Apple Releases Are About More Than Showing Off New Devices. Why Affordable iPhones and MacBooks Matter Now.
summary: Apple has just made it easier for people to become customers in an environment where competitors are raising prices.

headline: Is HP (HPQ) Now Offering Value After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether HP's share price still reflects what the business is worth, it helps to step back and look at the numbers behind the current market view. Right now, HP trades at US$19.18, with a 5.3% return over the last 7 days, a 3.2% decline over 30 days, a 13.3% decline year to date, and a 32.1% decline over the past year, alongside a 24.8% decline over 3 years and a 25.4% decline over 5 years. These moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing coverage of HP's position in...
